reference: Hi. I started using the Ortho Evra birth control patch two months ago, but it fell off early. I am experiencing nausea with some vomiting all day, every day for the past two weeks, tender, swollen, hot, painful breasts, serious fatigue sleeping eighteen to twenty-two hours a day, lower back pain, cramping, and slight spotting. Do you think this is due to the birth control, or do you think it may be a pregnancy?
text: Hi. I started using the OrthoEvra birth control patch two months ago, but it fell off early. I am experiencing nausea with some vomiting all day, every day for the past two weeks. Tender, swollen, hot, painful breasts, serious fatigue sleeping 18 to 22 hours a day, lower back pain, cramping, and slight spotting. Do you think this is due to the birth control, or do you think it may be a pregnancy?
